title: Site visit declaration form: Capital Grants
body: "You must submit a site visit declaration form for every site visit to your farm alongside your capital grant claim. The leader of the visiting group must sign section B at the end of their visit.  Submit this form with your capital claim form to: ruralpayments@defra.gov.uk. Use the subject heading ‘Educational Access Claim Evidence’. You can find out more details on the attached form. "
